brew:awscli.summary: awscli is a cloud-control CLI for AWS accounts, so agent runs should treat it as high-authority infrastructure access.
brew:awscli.credentialAccess: Reads AWS profiles, SSO cache, credential files, and environment credentials.
brew:awscli.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, and reconfigure AWS resources across many services.
brew:awscli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can upload artifacts, deploy functions, and change release infrastructure.
brew:awscli.recommendedControl: Use protected AWS credential helpers and approval gates for mutating commands.
brew:awscli.agentUseGuidance: Permit read-only inspection by default; require human approval for writes, deletes, credential export, and deploys.

brew:docker.summary: docker controls containers, images, mounts, registries, and local build state that agents can use to reach host files.
brew:docker.credentialAccess: Reads Docker registry auth, mounted secrets, build args, and files exposed through volume mounts.
brew:docker.remoteMutation: Can push images, change containers, and alter running local or remote Docker contexts.
brew:docker.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build and publish images that become production artifacts.
brew:docker.recommendedControl: Gate image pushes, privileged containers, host mounts, and context changes.
brew:docker.agentUseGuidance: Allow local inspection and builds with constrained mounts; require approval for registry pushes and privileged execution.

brew:node.summary: node executes JavaScript tooling that commonly reads project secrets and launches npm package workflows.
brew:node.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, dotenv files, npm tokens, and project config reachable to scripts.
brew:node.remoteMutation: Can run deploy scripts, API clients, and arbitrary package scripts.
brew:node.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build and publish npm packages or generated application bundles.
brew:node.recommendedControl: Gate package publishing and lifecycle scripts; scan project secrets before agent runs.
brew:node.agentUseGuidance: Allow test/build commands after scanning; require approval for publish, install scripts, and deploy actions.

brew:gh.summary: gh is the GitHub control-plane CLI for repositories, releases, issues, and authenticated developer state.
brew:gh.credentialAccess: Reads GitHub CLI tokens and can print or use them for API calls.
brew:gh.remoteMutation: Can modify repositories, pull requests, releases, secrets, and organization state.
brew:gh.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create releases, upload assets, and trigger release automation.
brew:gh.recommendedControl: Use GitHub token protection plus approval gates for write and token-display commands.
brew:gh.agentUseGuidance: Permit status and read-only queries; require approval for token output, release creation, repo writes, and workflow dispatch.

brew:git.summary: git can read repository history and mutate source-control state used by agents and humans.
brew:git.credentialAccess: Reads credential helpers, remotes, config, signed keys, and repository-local secret history.
brew:git.remoteMutation: Can push commits, tags, branches, and force updates to remote repositories.
brew:git.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish source changes and release tags that downstream systems consume.
brew:git.recommendedControl: Gate pushes, tag creation, credential fill, and remote rewrites.
brew:git.agentUseGuidance: Allow diff/status/log reads; require approval for pushes, credential-helper reads, and destructive history changes.

brew:helm.summary: helm manages Kubernetes release state and can deploy workloads into clusters.
brew:helm.credentialAccess: Uses kubeconfig, cluster tokens, chart repository credentials, and values files that may contain secrets.
brew:helm.remoteMutation: Can install, upgrade, rollback, or delete cluster releases.
brew:helm.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can package charts and deploy application artifacts to production clusters.
brew:helm.recommendedControl: Gate helm install, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, and repo credential changes.
brew:helm.agentUseGuidance: Allow template/lint reads; require approval before any cluster mutation or chart publication.

brew:uv.summary: uv manages Python environments, dependencies, tools, and package publishing workflows.
brew:uv.credentialAccess: Reads Python index credentials, environment variables, and project configuration.
brew:uv.remoteMutation: Can install packages, resolve remote indexes, and run project commands.
brew:uv.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build or publish Python packages when paired with packaging commands.
brew:uv.recommendedControl: Gate publishing and secret-backed index access; scan project env files first.
brew:uv.agentUseGuidance: Allow lock/test operations; require approval for publish, credentialed index writes, and script execution using secrets.

brew:kubernetes-cli.summary: kubernetes-cli provides kubectl, which controls Kubernetes clusters and workloads.
brew:kubernetes-cli.credentialAccess: Reads kubeconfig, exec credentials, cluster tokens, and namespace context.
brew:kubernetes-cli.remoteMutation: Can create, patch, delete, scale, and exec into cluster workloads.
brew:kubernetes-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can apply manifests that deploy or expose application artifacts.
brew:kubernetes-cli.recommendedControl: Gate kubectl apply, delete, patch, exec, port-forward, and context changes.
brew:kubernetes-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow get/describe with safe contexts; require approval for cluster writes and secret reads.

brew:pnpm.summary: pnpm manages JavaScript dependencies and package publishing with access to project scripts.
brew:pnpm.credentialAccess: Reads npmrc tokens, environment variables, and package lifecycle script inputs.
brew:pnpm.remoteMutation: Can install dependency trees and run scripts that call external services.
brew:pnpm.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish npm packages and produce release bundles.
brew:pnpm.recommendedControl: Gate publish, lifecycle scripts, and credentialed registry operations.
brew:pnpm.agentUseGuidance: Allow lockfile and test commands after scan; require approval for publish and install-script execution.

brew:pulumi.summary: pulumi is an infrastructure-as-code CLI that can mutate cloud resources from local state and credentials.
brew:pulumi.credentialAccess: Reads cloud credentials, Pulumi tokens, stack config, and secret providers.
brew:pulumi.remoteMutation: Can create, update, and destroy cloud infrastructure.
brew:pulumi.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy application infrastructure and write stack outputs.
brew:pulumi.recommendedControl: Gate pulumi up, destroy, refresh with writes, and config secret changes.
brew:pulumi.agentUseGuidance: Allow preview only by default; require approval for any state-changing operation.

brew:ruby.summary: ruby runs project tooling, package builds, and scripts that often sit near credentials.
brew:ruby.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, bundle config, gem credentials, and app secrets.
brew:ruby.remoteMutation: Can run deploy scripts, API clients, and database tasks.
brew:ruby.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build or publish gems and generated application artifacts.
brew:ruby.recommendedControl: Gate gem publish, deploy tasks, and script execution with injected secrets.
brew:ruby.agentUseGuidance: Allow local tests; require approval for publishing, deploy commands, and secret-backed tasks.

brew:go.summary: go builds and runs binaries that can access project files, modules, and release workflows.
brew:go.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, private module credentials, Git credentials, and project config.
brew:go.remoteMutation: Can run tools that call cloud, Git, or deployment APIs.
brew:go.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can produce release binaries and publish modules or container images via scripts.
brew:go.recommendedControl: Gate release, private-module, and deployment commands.
brew:go.agentUseGuidance: Allow build/test commands; require approval for release publishing and credentialed module operations.

brew:curl.summary: curl can fetch remote scripts, call APIs, and exfiltrate data from files an agent can read.
brew:curl.credentialAccess: Reads netrc files, headers, cookies, tokens, and files used as request bodies.
brew:curl.remoteMutation: Can call arbitrary HTTP APIs that mutate remote systems.
brew:curl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can upload artifacts or run installer pipelines when paired with a shell.
brew:curl.recommendedControl: Gate credentialed requests, file uploads, and pipe-to-shell installer patterns.
brew:curl.agentUseGuidance: Allow simple public fetches; require approval for authenticated requests, uploads, and shell execution.

brew:ansible.summary: ansible automates hosts and infrastructure from local inventories and credentials.
brew:ansible.credentialAccess: Reads SSH keys, vault files, inventories, cloud credentials, and environment variables.
brew:ansible.remoteMutation: Can configure remote hosts, cloud resources, and application deployments.
brew:ansible.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can roll out generated config, binaries, and service changes.
brew:ansible.recommendedControl: Gate playbook runs, vault decrypts, and inventory changes.
brew:ansible.agentUseGuidance: Allow syntax checks and dry runs; require approval for playbook execution against real targets.

brew:opencode.summary: opencode is an agent-facing coding tool that can read files and invoke local developer workflows.
brew:opencode.credentialAccess: May access repository files, tool configs, and environment variables available to the agent session.
brew:opencode.remoteMutation: Can trigger local tools that mutate Git, cloud, or package state.
brew:opencode.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate code or commands that become release artifacts.
brew:opencode.recommendedControl: Run under containment and gate sensitive tool actions.
brew:opencode.agentUseGuidance: Use with scanned worktrees; require approval before commands that expose credentials or mutate remote systems.

brew:vercel-cli.summary: vercel-cli deploys applications and manages hosted project state.
brew:vercel-cli.credentialAccess: Reads Vercel auth tokens, project links, env vars, and deployment config.
brew:vercel-cli.remoteMutation: Can deploy, promote, alias, and change remote project settings.
brew:vercel-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes application builds to Vercel infrastructure.
brew:vercel-cli.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, promote, env, alias, and project-setting commands.
brew:vercel-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow status and build checks; require approval before any deploy or environment mutation.

brew:rust.summary: rust tooling builds binaries and can publish crates through Cargo workflows.
brew:rust.credentialAccess: Reads Cargo credentials, Git credentials, environment variables, and project config.
brew:rust.remoteMutation: Can run build scripts and toolchain commands that call external systems.
brew:rust.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish crates and release binaries.
brew:rust.recommendedControl: Gate cargo publish, install scripts, and credentialed registry access.
brew:rust.agentUseGuidance: Allow build/test/doc commands; require approval for publish and release automation.

brew:yarn.summary: yarn manages JavaScript dependencies and package scripts with registry access.
brew:yarn.credentialAccess: Reads npm/yarn registry tokens, environment variables, and package scripts.
brew:yarn.remoteMutation: Can install packages and run scripts that modify remote systems.
brew:yarn.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish packages and build release artifacts.
brew:yarn.recommendedControl: Gate publish, install scripts, and credentialed registry operations.
brew:yarn.agentUseGuidance: Allow local test/build after scan; require approval for publish and lifecycle scripts.

brew:gemini-cli.summary: gemini-cli is an AI CLI that can combine model access with local files and tool calls.
brew:gemini-cli.credentialAccess: Reads model API credentials, environment variables, and files included in prompts.
brew:gemini-cli.remoteMutation: Can drive local commands or API calls if granted tool access.
brew:gemini-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate code and release commands that become artifacts.
brew:gemini-cli.recommendedControl: Run in containment and gate all secret-backed or mutating commands.
brew:gemini-cli.agentUseGuidance: Limit file scope and require approval before exposing secrets or running deployment tools.

brew:kubeseal.summary: kubeseal transforms Kubernetes secrets and is tied to cluster secret-management workflows.
brew:kubeseal.credentialAccess: Handles secret manifests and cluster public keys; input files may contain sensitive values.
brew:kubeseal.remoteMutation: Does not usually mutate clusters directly, but output is intended for cluster application.
brew:kubeseal.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can produce sealed secret artifacts committed or deployed to clusters.
brew:kubeseal.recommendedControl: Gate commands that read plaintext secret files or write deployable sealed secrets.
brew:kubeseal.agentUseGuidance: Allow public-key fetches; require approval before processing plaintext secrets or writing manifests.

brew:argocd.summary: argocd controls GitOps applications and live cluster deployment state.
brew:argocd.credentialAccess: Reads Argo CD tokens, kubeconfig, and repository credentials.
brew:argocd.remoteMutation: Can sync, rollback, delete, and change applications.
brew:argocd.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy Git-sourced artifacts into clusters.
brew:argocd.recommendedControl: Gate sync, app delete, rollback, and credential commands.
brew:argocd.agentUseGuidance: Allow app status reads; require approval for syncs, deletes, and project changes.

brew:azure-cli.summary: azure-cli controls Azure accounts, resources, subscriptions, and deployments.
brew:azure-cli.credentialAccess: Reads Azure account tokens, config files, cloud credentials, and environment variables.
brew:azure-cli.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, and reconfigure Azure infrastructure.
brew:azure-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy application artifacts and infrastructure templates.
brew:azure-cli.recommendedControl: Gate mutating az commands and credential export or login changes.
brew:azure-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow account/resource reads in safe subscriptions; require approval for writes and deletes.

brew:opentofu.summary: opentofu plans and applies infrastructure changes from local state and cloud credentials.
brew:opentofu.credentialAccess: Reads backend credentials, provider credentials, variables, and state data.
brew:opentofu.remoteMutation: Can create, update, or destroy infrastructure resources.
brew:opentofu.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy infrastructure that exposes or runs application artifacts.
brew:opentofu.recommendedControl: Gate apply, destroy, import, state, and backend changes.
brew:opentofu.agentUseGuidance: Allow plan by default; require approval for any state-changing command.

brew:talosctl.summary: talosctl manages Talos Linux clusters and node configuration.
brew:talosctl.credentialAccess: Reads Talos config, cluster endpoints, and administrative credentials.
brew:talosctl.remoteMutation: Can reboot nodes, apply machine config, and change cluster state.
brew:talosctl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can roll out machine configuration that affects workloads.
brew:talosctl.recommendedControl: Gate config apply, reset, reboot, and destructive cluster commands.
brew:talosctl.agentUseGuidance: Allow health and config inspection; require approval for node or cluster mutations.

brew:cloudflared.summary: cloudflared manages tunnels, DNS-facing connectivity, and Cloudflare access paths.
brew:cloudflared.credentialAccess: Reads tunnel credentials, Cloudflare tokens, and local tunnel config.
brew:cloudflared.remoteMutation: Can create tunnels, route traffic, and update service exposure.
brew:cloudflared.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can expose local or internal services to the network.
brew:cloudflared.recommendedControl: Gate tunnel creation, route changes, token use, and service exposure.
brew:cloudflared.agentUseGuidance: Allow tunnel status checks; require approval before exposing endpoints or changing routes.

brew:podman.summary: podman builds and runs containers with registry and host filesystem access.
brew:podman.credentialAccess: Reads registry credentials, build secrets, environment variables, and mounted files.
brew:podman.remoteMutation: Can push images and change container or pod state.
brew:podman.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build and publish container images.
brew:podman.recommendedControl: Gate pushes, privileged runs, host mounts, and kube generation.
brew:podman.agentUseGuidance: Allow local inspect/build with limited mounts; require approval for publish or privileged actions.

brew:oci-cli.summary: oci-cli controls Oracle Cloud resources and account state.
brew:oci-cli.credentialAccess: Reads OCI config, API keys, tenancy data, and environment credentials.
brew:oci-cli.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, or modify Oracle Cloud resources.
brew:oci-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can upload artifacts and deploy infrastructure changes.
brew:oci-cli.recommendedControl: Gate mutating oci commands and credential file access.
brew:oci-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow read-only listing; require approval for writes, deletes, and credential changes.

brew:rclone.summary: rclone moves data across local and remote storage providers.
brew:rclone.credentialAccess: Reads remote storage tokens, config files, and files selected for transfer.
brew:rclone.remoteMutation: Can copy, delete, sync, and purge remote storage.
brew:rclone.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can upload or delete release artifacts, backups, and datasets.
brew:rclone.recommendedControl: Gate sync, delete, purge, config, and token-revealing commands.
brew:rclone.agentUseGuidance: Allow dry-run listings; require approval for transfers, deletes, and config export.

brew:mkcert.summary: mkcert creates local certificate authorities and development certificates.
brew:mkcert.credentialAccess: Touches local trust stores and private key material.
brew:mkcert.remoteMutation: Primarily mutates local trust state, not remote systems.
brew:mkcert.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create certificates that influence development service trust.
brew:mkcert.recommendedControl: Gate CA installation and private-key handling.
brew:mkcert.agentUseGuidance: Allow certificate inspection; require approval before installing trust roots or writing private keys.

brew:openssl@3.summary: openssl handles cryptographic keys, certificates, secrets, and encrypted payloads.
brew:openssl@3.credentialAccess: Can read private keys, certificates, encrypted files, and passphrases.
brew:openssl@3.remoteMutation: Does not mutate remote systems directly but can prepare credentials used elsewhere.
brew:openssl@3.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can produce keys, CSRs, signatures, and artifacts used in releases.
brew:openssl@3.recommendedControl: Gate private-key reads, key generation, signing, and decryption commands.
brew:openssl@3.agentUseGuidance: Allow public certificate inspection; require approval before reading or producing secret key material.

cask:codex.summary: codex is an AI coding agent application with local file and tool access potential.
cask:codex.credentialAccess: May access repository files, local configs, and credentials exposed to its runtime.
cask:codex.remoteMutation: Can ask or drive tools that mutate repositories, packages, and cloud services.
cask:codex.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate code, patches, and release commands.
cask:codex.recommendedControl: Run with scanned worktrees and gate sensitive host tool calls.
cask:codex.agentUseGuidance: Limit workspace scope; require approval before commands expose secrets or change remote state.

npm:pnpm.summary: pnpm from npm manages package installs and scripts with registry authority.
npm:pnpm.credentialAccess: Reads npm tokens, registry config, environment variables, and lifecycle script context.
npm:pnpm.remoteMutation: Can run scripts and registry operations that affect remote state.
npm:pnpm.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish npm packages and build distributable bundles.
npm:pnpm.recommendedControl: Gate publish, install scripts, and credentialed registry use.
npm:pnpm.agentUseGuidance: Allow lockfile/test work after scan; require approval for publish and lifecycle execution.

brew:mysql.summary: mysql provides client and server tooling that can read or mutate databases.
brew:mysql.credentialAccess: Reads database passwords, option files, client config, and environment credentials.
brew:mysql.remoteMutation: Can create, drop, alter, and export databases on reachable servers.
brew:mysql.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can dump or import data artifacts that may contain sensitive records.
brew:mysql.recommendedControl: Gate destructive SQL, dumps, imports, and credential file access.
brew:mysql.agentUseGuidance: Allow schema inspection on safe targets; require approval for writes, dumps, and credential reads.

brew:tailscale.summary: tailscale controls private network connectivity and identity-bound device access.
brew:tailscale.credentialAccess: Reads auth state, device identity, and network configuration.
brew:tailscale.remoteMutation: Can change connectivity, serve routes, and expose local services.
brew:tailscale.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can make internal services reachable through a tailnet.
brew:tailscale.recommendedControl: Gate up, serve, funnel, exit-node, and auth-key operations.
brew:tailscale.agentUseGuidance: Allow status checks; require approval before changing network exposure or authentication.

brew:atuin.summary: atuin stores and syncs shell history, which may include sensitive commands.
brew:atuin.credentialAccess: Reads shell history, sync tokens, and command text that may contain secrets.
brew:atuin.remoteMutation: Can sync history to remote storage and change account state.
brew:atuin.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish sensitive command history to a sync backend.
brew:atuin.recommendedControl: Gate sync, import, and commands that expose stored history.
brew:atuin.agentUseGuidance: Allow local search cautiously; require approval before sync or history export.

brew:composer.summary: composer manages PHP dependencies and package publishing workflows.
brew:composer.credentialAccess: Reads auth.json, repository tokens, environment variables, and project config.
brew:composer.remoteMutation: Can install packages and run scripts that affect remote systems.
brew:composer.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish packages or build deployable PHP artifacts.
brew:composer.recommendedControl: Gate scripts, publish operations, and credentialed repository access.
brew:composer.agentUseGuidance: Allow dependency inspection; require approval for scripts, publishes, and private-repo credentials.

brew:hcloud.summary: hcloud controls Hetzner Cloud resources from local credentials.
brew:hcloud.credentialAccess: Reads Hetzner Cloud tokens, config files, and environment credentials.
brew:hcloud.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, and resize cloud servers, volumes, and networks.
brew:hcloud.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy infrastructure used by application artifacts.
brew:hcloud.recommendedControl: Gate mutating hcloud commands and token access.
brew:hcloud.agentUseGuidance: Allow list/describe operations; require approval for writes, deletes, and token changes.

brew:luarocks.summary: luarocks manages Lua packages and can install or publish project dependencies.
brew:luarocks.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, server credentials, and local package config.
brew:luarocks.remoteMutation: Can install packages and interact with package servers.
brew:luarocks.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish Lua rocks and generated package artifacts.
brew:luarocks.recommendedControl: Gate upload, install scripts, and credentialed server operations.
brew:luarocks.agentUseGuidance: Allow dependency queries; require approval for package publication and secret-backed actions.

brew:checkov.summary: checkov scans infrastructure code and may read sensitive templates and policy context.
brew:checkov.credentialAccess: Reads IaC files, environment variables, and optional platform tokens.
brew:checkov.remoteMutation: Usually read-only, but integrations can report to remote services.
brew:checkov.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can produce security reports that may include resource names and paths.
brew:checkov.recommendedControl: Gate token-backed uploads and scans over secret-bearing files.
brew:checkov.agentUseGuidance: Allow local scans; require approval before uploading findings or scanning sensitive directories.

brew:mysql@8.0.summary: mysql@8.0 provides MySQL client/server tooling with database mutation authority.
brew:mysql@8.0.credentialAccess: Reads database passwords, option files, socket paths, and environment credentials.
brew:mysql@8.0.remoteMutation: Can alter, drop, import, or export databases.
brew:mysql@8.0.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create dumps or imports containing sensitive data.
brew:mysql@8.0.recommendedControl: Gate destructive SQL, dumps, imports, and credential file access.
brew:mysql@8.0.agentUseGuidance: Allow safe metadata queries; require approval for writes, exports, and credential reads.

brew:aliyun-cli.summary: aliyun-cli controls Alibaba Cloud resources from local credentials.
brew:aliyun-cli.credentialAccess: Reads Alibaba Cloud access keys, profiles, and environment credentials.
brew:aliyun-cli.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, and modify cloud resources.
brew:aliyun-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy infrastructure and upload artifacts to cloud services.
brew:aliyun-cli.recommendedControl: Gate mutating aliyun commands and credential access.
brew:aliyun-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow read-only listing; require approval for writes, deletes, and deploys.

brew:nuget.summary: nuget manages .NET packages and registry publishing.
brew:nuget.credentialAccess: Reads NuGet API keys, package source credentials, and config files.
brew:nuget.remoteMutation: Can push packages and change package-source state.
brew:nuget.recommendedControl: Gate push, delete, source credential, and API-key commands.
brew:nuget.agentUseGuidance: Allow restore/list; require approval for package publication and credential changes.

cask:1password-cli.summary: 1password-cli brokers access to secrets and vault items from local workflows.
cask:1password-cli.credentialAccess: Can read secrets, documents, and account metadata after authentication.
cask:1password-cli.remoteMutation: Can edit vault items and service-account-backed secret state.
cask:1password-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can export or inject secrets into downstream release tools.
cask:1password-cli.recommendedControl: Gate item reads, exports, edits, and service-account token use.
cask:1password-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow metadata inspection only; require approval for secret reads or item mutations.

cask:claude-code.summary: claude-code is an AI coding agent with local file and command access potential.
cask:claude-code.credentialAccess: May access project files, model credentials, and local tool configs exposed to the session.
cask:claude-code.remoteMutation: Can drive tools that mutate Git, cloud, package, or deployment state.
cask:claude-code.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate code and execute release or deployment commands.
cask:claude-code.recommendedControl: Run under containment and gate sensitive host tool actions.
cask:claude-code.agentUseGuidance: Limit workspace scope; require approval before secret exposure, publishing, or remote writes.

brew:cloudflare-wrangler.summary: cloudflare-wrangler deploys and manages Cloudflare Workers and related resources.
brew:cloudflare-wrangler.credentialAccess: Reads Cloudflare tokens, account IDs, project config, and environment variables.
brew:cloudflare-wrangler.remoteMutation: Can deploy workers, change routes, and mutate Cloudflare resources.
brew:cloudflare-wrangler.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes worker scripts and static assets to production edges.
brew:cloudflare-wrangler.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, secret, route, and account mutation commands.
brew:cloudflare-wrangler.agentUseGuidance: Allow local build/dev; require approval before deploys, secret changes, or route updates.

brew:docker-machine.summary: docker-machine provisions and manages Docker hosts and credentials.
brew:docker-machine.credentialAccess: Reads machine certificates, SSH keys, and Docker host credentials.
brew:docker-machine.remoteMutation: Can create, remove, start, stop, and configure Docker hosts.
brew:docker-machine.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can expose or replace infrastructure used for container workloads.
brew:docker-machine.recommendedControl: Gate create, rm, regenerate-certs, env, and host mutation commands.
brew:docker-machine.agentUseGuidance: Allow inspect/status; require approval for host creation, deletion, and credential export.

brew:mariadb.summary: mariadb provides database server and client tooling with data mutation authority.
brew:mariadb.credentialAccess: Reads database passwords, option files, socket config, and environment credentials.
brew:mariadb.remoteMutation: Can alter schemas, users, and data on reachable database servers.
brew:mariadb.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can export or import data artifacts containing sensitive records.
brew:mariadb.recommendedControl: Gate destructive SQL, dumps, imports, and credential file reads.
brew:mariadb.agentUseGuidance: Allow safe schema reads; require approval for writes, exports, and credential access.

brew:mysql@8.4.summary: mysql@8.4 provides MySQL database tooling that can affect local or remote data.
brew:mysql@8.4.credentialAccess: Reads database credentials, option files, and environment variables.
brew:mysql@8.4.remoteMutation: Can create, alter, drop, import, or export database state.
brew:mysql@8.4.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate dumps or imports that include sensitive records.
brew:mysql@8.4.recommendedControl: Gate destructive SQL, dump/import commands, and credential reads.
brew:mysql@8.4.agentUseGuidance: Allow metadata inspection; require approval for data writes, dumps, imports, and secret access.

brew:openvpn.summary: openvpn controls VPN connectivity and can route agent traffic through private networks.
brew:openvpn.credentialAccess: Reads VPN profiles, private keys, certificates, passwords, and auth files.
brew:openvpn.remoteMutation: Primarily changes network reachability, not application data.
brew:openvpn.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can expose private network access to downstream tools.
brew:openvpn.recommendedControl: Gate VPN start, config reads, and private-key handling.
brew:openvpn.agentUseGuidance: Allow config validation; require approval before connecting or reading credential material.

brew:mise.summary: mise manages language runtimes and can execute project toolchain hooks.
brew:mise.credentialAccess: Reads project config, environment variables, and tool-specific credentials.
brew:mise.remoteMutation: Can install runtimes and run configured tasks that call remote systems.
brew:mise.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can drive build and release commands through tasks.
brew:mise.recommendedControl: Gate task execution, plugin installs, and secret-backed commands.
brew:mise.agentUseGuidance: Allow version inspection; require approval for task runs that publish, deploy, or install plugins.

brew:pyenv.summary: pyenv manages Python versions and can affect interpreter resolution for agent-run tools.
brew:pyenv.credentialAccess: Reads project config and environment variables but not secrets by default.
brew:pyenv.remoteMutation: Usually local, but installed Python tools may call remote services.
brew:pyenv.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can influence build artifacts by changing interpreter versions.
brew:pyenv.recommendedControl: Gate plugin installs and commands that run project scripts with secrets.
brew:pyenv.agentUseGuidance: Allow version switching and inspection; require approval before plugin installs or secret-backed scripts.

npm:codex.summary: codex from npm is an AI coding agent package with local file and command access potential.
npm:codex.credentialAccess: May access project files, model tokens, environment variables, and local tool configs.
npm:codex.remoteMutation: Can drive commands that mutate repositories, packages, or cloud state.
npm:codex.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate code and invoke release or deployment workflows.
npm:codex.recommendedControl: Run under containment and gate sensitive host tool calls.
npm:codex.agentUseGuidance: Limit workspace scope; require approval before secrets, publishing, or remote writes.

brew:maven.summary: maven builds Java projects and can deploy artifacts to package repositories.
brew:maven.credentialAccess: Reads settings.xml credentials, environment variables, and repository auth.
brew:maven.remoteMutation: Can deploy artifacts and run plugins that call remote services.
brew:maven.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish jars, plugins, and release metadata.
brew:maven.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, release plugins, and credentialed repository access.
brew:maven.agentUseGuidance: Allow test/package goals; require approval for deploy, release, and secret-backed plugin goals.

brew:perl.summary: perl runs scripts and package workflows that may sit near credentials.
brew:perl.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, config files, and script inputs.
brew:perl.remoteMutation: Can run arbitrary automation that calls APIs or changes files.
brew:perl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build or publish CPAN-style artifacts through related tooling.
brew:perl.recommendedControl: Gate script execution when secrets or network mutation are involved.
brew:perl.agentUseGuidance: Allow local lint/test scripts; require approval for secret-backed or publishing scripts.

brew:httpie.summary: httpie sends HTTP requests and can call authenticated APIs from local credentials.
brew:httpie.credentialAccess: Reads tokens, headers, cookies, netrc-style credentials, and request body files.
brew:httpie.remoteMutation: Can call arbitrary APIs that mutate remote systems.
brew:httpie.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can upload files or trigger deployment APIs.
brew:httpie.recommendedControl: Gate authenticated requests, file uploads, and destructive HTTP methods.
brew:httpie.agentUseGuidance: Allow public GETs; require approval for credentialed requests, uploads, POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE.

brew:sbt.summary: sbt builds Scala projects and can publish artifacts to repositories.
brew:sbt.credentialAccess: Reads credentials files, environment variables, and repository config.
brew:sbt.remoteMutation: Can run tasks and plugins that publish or call remote services.
brew:sbt.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish jars, plugins, and release metadata.
brew:sbt.recommendedControl: Gate publish, release, and credentialed repository tasks.
brew:sbt.agentUseGuidance: Allow compile/test; require approval for publish, release, and secret-backed tasks.

brew:cmake.summary: cmake configures native builds and can run project-defined build commands.
brew:cmake.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, toolchain files, and project config.
brew:cmake.remoteMutation: Usually local, but custom commands can call external services.
brew:cmake.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can produce native release artifacts and installer packages.
brew:cmake.recommendedControl: Gate install/package targets and custom commands that use secrets.
brew:cmake.agentUseGuidance: Allow configure/build in scanned worktrees; require approval for install, package, and secret-backed custom targets.

brew:python@3.13.summary: python@3.13 runs scripts, tooling, and package workflows that often process secrets.
brew:python@3.13.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, dotenv files, keyrings, and project config.
brew:python@3.13.remoteMutation: Can run API clients, deploy scripts, and package tools.
brew:python@3.13.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build wheels, publish packages, and generate application artifacts.
brew:python@3.13.recommendedControl: Gate publishing, deploy scripts, and secret-backed Python commands.
brew:python@3.13.agentUseGuidance: Allow tests and local scripts after scanning; require approval for publishing or network-mutating scripts.

brew:skopeo.summary: skopeo copies and inspects container images across registries.
brew:skopeo.credentialAccess: Reads registry credentials, auth files, and image source credentials.
brew:skopeo.remoteMutation: Can copy, sync, delete, or overwrite remote image references.
brew:skopeo.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish container images and signatures to registries.
brew:skopeo.recommendedControl: Gate copy, sync, delete, and credentialed registry operations.
brew:skopeo.agentUseGuidance: Allow inspect on public images; require approval for registry writes or private credentials.

brew:rsync.summary: rsync transfers files locally or remotely and can overwrite or delete destinations.
brew:rsync.credentialAccess: Reads SSH keys, source files, and paths selected for transfer.
brew:rsync.remoteMutation: Can sync, overwrite, or delete files on remote hosts.
brew:rsync.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish build artifacts or remove deployed files.
brew:rsync.recommendedControl: Gate remote syncs, deletes, and secret-bearing source paths.
brew:rsync.agentUseGuidance: Allow dry runs; require approval for remote writes, deletes, and transfers of sensitive paths.

brew:openssh.summary: openssh provides remote login, key, and transfer tools with broad host access.
brew:openssh.credentialAccess: Reads SSH keys, agent sockets, known hosts, config, and forwarded credentials.
brew:openssh.remoteMutation: Can execute commands and transfer files on remote hosts.
brew:openssh.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy files, change servers, and expose forwarded credentials.
brew:openssh.recommendedControl: Gate remote command execution, scp/sftp writes, key generation, and agent forwarding.
brew:openssh.agentUseGuidance: Allow local key inspection; require approval before connecting to or mutating remote hosts.

brew:sqlcmd.summary: sqlcmd sends SQL to Microsoft SQL Server and Azure SQL targets.
brew:sqlcmd.credentialAccess: Reads database passwords, connection strings, tokens, and environment credentials.
brew:sqlcmd.remoteMutation: Can create, alter, drop, import, and export database state.
brew:sqlcmd.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can dump or load data artifacts containing sensitive records.
brew:sqlcmd.recommendedControl: Gate write SQL, dumps, imports, and credential-bearing connection strings.
brew:sqlcmd.agentUseGuidance: Allow safe metadata queries; require approval for writes, exports, and secret use.

brew:coreutils.summary: coreutils supplies file utilities that can read, delete, and transform local data at scale.
brew:coreutils.credentialAccess: Can read files and environment exposed to the agent session.
brew:coreutils.remoteMutation: Primarily local, but can prepare data for other remote tools.
brew:coreutils.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can delete or rewrite build outputs and generated artifacts.
brew:coreutils.recommendedControl: Gate destructive file operations over broad or sensitive paths.
brew:coreutils.agentUseGuidance: Allow narrow reads; require approval for recursive deletes, overwrites, and secret-path reads.

brew:doctl.summary: doctl controls DigitalOcean resources from local credentials.
brew:doctl.credentialAccess: Reads DigitalOcean tokens, kubeconfig, and environment credentials.
brew:doctl.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, and modify droplets, clusters, registries, and apps.
brew:doctl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can deploy apps and push container registry artifacts.
brew:doctl.recommendedControl: Gate mutating doctl commands and credential access.
brew:doctl.agentUseGuidance: Allow read-only listings; require approval for writes, deletes, deploys, and token changes.

brew:ffmpeg.summary: ffmpeg processes media files and can read or overwrite local artifacts.
brew:ffmpeg.credentialAccess: Can read input files, network URLs, and metadata that may be sensitive.
brew:ffmpeg.remoteMutation: Usually local, but supports network inputs and outputs.
brew:ffmpeg.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create, overwrite, or stream media artifacts.
brew:ffmpeg.recommendedControl: Gate network outputs, overwrites, and reads from sensitive paths.
brew:ffmpeg.agentUseGuidance: Allow local transforms in safe directories; require approval for overwrites, uploads, and sensitive inputs.

brew:flyctl.summary: flyctl deploys and manages Fly.io applications and infrastructure.
brew:flyctl.credentialAccess: Reads Fly tokens, app config, secrets, and environment variables.
brew:flyctl.remoteMutation: Can deploy, scale, destroy, and change remote app state.
brew:flyctl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes application images and release configuration.
brew:flyctl.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, secrets, scale, destroy, and token commands.
brew:flyctl.agentUseGuidance: Allow status and config reads; require approval for deploys, secret changes, and destructive operations.

brew:imagemagick.summary: imagemagick processes image files and can read or overwrite local artifacts.
brew:imagemagick.credentialAccess: Can read images, metadata, and paths selected by command arguments.
brew:imagemagick.remoteMutation: Primarily local, with possible delegated tools depending on formats.
brew:imagemagick.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create or overwrite generated visual artifacts.
brew:imagemagick.recommendedControl: Gate broad input globs, overwrites, and processing of sensitive directories.
brew:imagemagick.agentUseGuidance: Allow safe local conversions; require approval for recursive operations or sensitive input paths.

brew:railway.summary: railway manages Railway projects, services, variables, and deployments.
brew:railway.credentialAccess: Reads Railway tokens, project links, and environment variable data.
brew:railway.remoteMutation: Can deploy, change variables, and mutate hosted services.
brew:railway.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes application builds and deployment state.
brew:railway.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, variable, service, and token commands.
brew:railway.agentUseGuidance: Allow status reads; require approval for deploys, variable changes, and service mutations.

brew:firebase-cli.summary: firebase-cli deploys and manages Firebase projects and Google-backed resources.
brew:firebase-cli.credentialAccess: Reads Firebase auth tokens, project config, service credentials, and environment variables.
brew:firebase-cli.remoteMutation: Can deploy hosting, functions, rules, and project configuration.
brew:firebase-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes web assets, functions, and security rules.
brew:firebase-cli.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, functions, rules, login, and token operations.
brew:firebase-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow project inspection; require approval before deploys or rule changes.

brew:glab.summary: glab controls GitLab repositories, pipelines, releases, and authenticated project state.
brew:glab.credentialAccess: Reads GitLab tokens, config, and repository credentials.
brew:glab.remoteMutation: Can create releases, merge requests, issues, pipelines, and repo changes.
brew:glab.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can upload release assets and trigger CI/CD.
brew:glab.recommendedControl: Gate token output, release, pipeline, and write commands.
brew:glab.agentUseGuidance: Allow read-only queries; require approval for releases, pipeline triggers, and project writes.

brew:fastlane.summary: fastlane automates mobile build, signing, and release workflows.
brew:fastlane.credentialAccess: Reads signing keys, app-store credentials, API keys, and environment variables.
brew:fastlane.remoteMutation: Can upload builds, modify metadata, and trigger release workflows.
brew:fastlane.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes mobile app builds and release metadata.
brew:fastlane.recommendedControl: Gate upload, signing, match, deliver, pilot, and credential commands.
brew:fastlane.agentUseGuidance: Allow lane inspection; require approval for signing, uploads, and store mutations.

brew:poetry.summary: poetry manages Python dependencies and package publishing.
brew:poetry.credentialAccess: Reads PyPI tokens, repository credentials, environment variables, and project config.
brew:poetry.remoteMutation: Can install dependencies and interact with package repositories.
brew:poetry.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can build and publish Python packages.
brew:poetry.recommendedControl: Gate publish, config, and credentialed repository operations.
brew:poetry.agentUseGuidance: Allow lock/test/build; require approval for publish and credential changes.

brew:colima.summary: colima controls local container and Kubernetes runtimes used by developer workflows.
brew:colima.credentialAccess: Can expose mounted files, container credentials, and runtime config.
brew:colima.remoteMutation: Primarily local, but containers can call remote services.
brew:colima.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can affect containerized build artifacts and local cluster state.
brew:colima.recommendedControl: Gate privileged runtime changes, mounts, and Kubernetes enablement.
brew:colima.agentUseGuidance: Allow status checks; require approval for start options exposing host paths or privileged runtimes.

brew:k9s.summary: k9s is an interactive Kubernetes UI with cluster read and mutation capability.
brew:k9s.credentialAccess: Reads kubeconfig, cluster tokens, and pod/secret views allowed by the current context.
brew:k9s.remoteMutation: Can delete, edit, scale, and exec into Kubernetes resources.
brew:k9s.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can change live workloads and configuration.
brew:k9s.recommendedControl: Gate launch in privileged contexts and commands that mutate resources.
brew:k9s.agentUseGuidance: Use read-only contexts for agents; require approval before interactive cluster mutation.

brew:kustomize.summary: kustomize builds Kubernetes manifests that are commonly applied to clusters.
brew:kustomize.credentialAccess: Reads manifest files that may include secret generators or config references.
brew:kustomize.remoteMutation: Build is local, but output is intended for cluster mutation.
brew:kustomize.recommendedControl: Gate secret-generator inputs and downstream apply operations.
brew:kustomize.agentUseGuidance: Allow build output review; require approval before applying generated manifests or reading secret files.

brew:yt-dlp.summary: yt-dlp downloads media and can read cookies or credentials for authenticated sources.
brew:yt-dlp.credentialAccess: Reads browser cookies, netrc credentials, config files, and output paths.
brew:yt-dlp.remoteMutation: Mostly downloads, but may access authenticated services.
brew:yt-dlp.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create large media artifacts and expose private media locally.
brew:yt-dlp.recommendedControl: Gate cookie reads, authenticated downloads, and broad output paths.
brew:yt-dlp.agentUseGuidance: Allow public metadata queries; require approval for cookie use and private downloads.

brew:helmfile.summary: helmfile orchestrates Helm releases across environments and clusters.
brew:helmfile.credentialAccess: Reads kubeconfig, chart repository credentials, values files, and secrets references.
brew:helmfile.remoteMutation: Can apply, sync, and destroy multiple cluster releases.
brew:helmfile.publishOrArtifactRisk: Deploys application and infrastructure manifests to clusters.
brew:helmfile.recommendedControl: Gate sync, apply, destroy, and secret-backed values access.
brew:helmfile.agentUseGuidance: Allow diff/template; require approval for cluster mutations or secret values.

brew:wget.summary: wget fetches remote content and can mirror sites or download installer scripts.
brew:wget.credentialAccess: Reads netrc credentials, cookies, headers, and output file paths.
brew:wget.remoteMutation: Usually fetch-only, but can call authenticated endpoints and write local files.
brew:wget.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can download scripts or artifacts that later execute or deploy.
brew:wget.recommendedControl: Gate authenticated downloads, recursive mirrors, and shell installer use.
brew:wget.agentUseGuidance: Allow public single-file downloads; require approval for credentials, recursion, and executable outputs.

brew:aws-iam-authenticator.summary: aws-iam-authenticator bridges AWS credentials into Kubernetes authentication.
brew:aws-iam-authenticator.credentialAccess: Reads AWS credentials, kubeconfig, and IAM identity context.
brew:aws-iam-authenticator.remoteMutation: Authentication is not mutation, but it enables subsequent Kubernetes writes.
brew:aws-iam-authenticator.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can unlock cluster access used by deployment tools.
brew:aws-iam-authenticator.recommendedControl: Gate credential use and cluster context switching.
brew:aws-iam-authenticator.agentUseGuidance: Allow identity inspection; require approval before enabling cluster access for mutating tools.

brew:buf.summary: buf manages protobuf linting, generation, and registry workflows.
brew:buf.credentialAccess: Reads registry tokens, environment variables, and project schema files.
brew:buf.remoteMutation: Can push modules and interact with remote schema registries.
brew:buf.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish schema modules and generated artifacts.
brew:buf.recommendedControl: Gate push, registry login, and token-backed commands.
brew:buf.agentUseGuidance: Allow lint/generate; require approval for registry writes and token use.

brew:ctlptl.summary: ctlptl manages local Kubernetes clusters and container registry wiring.
brew:ctlptl.credentialAccess: Reads kubeconfig, local cluster config, and registry settings.
brew:ctlptl.remoteMutation: Primarily local, but can affect reachable Kubernetes contexts.
brew:ctlptl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can change local cluster state used for builds and deploy tests.
brew:ctlptl.recommendedControl: Gate cluster create/delete and registry mutation commands.
brew:ctlptl.agentUseGuidance: Allow status and config review; require approval for cluster lifecycle changes.

brew:dropbox-uploader.summary: dropbox-uploader transfers files to and from Dropbox using local credentials.
brew:dropbox-uploader.credentialAccess: Reads Dropbox tokens, config, and selected local files.
brew:dropbox-uploader.remoteMutation: Can upload, delete, move, and overwrite Dropbox content.
brew:dropbox-uploader.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish or remove artifacts in shared storage.
brew:dropbox-uploader.recommendedControl: Gate uploads, deletes, moves, and token reads.
brew:dropbox-uploader.agentUseGuidance: Allow listing; require approval for transfers, deletes, and sensitive file paths.

brew:fauna-shell.summary: fauna-shell controls Fauna databases and can execute data mutations.
brew:fauna-shell.credentialAccess: Reads Fauna secrets, endpoint config, and environment credentials.
brew:fauna-shell.remoteMutation: Can create, update, delete, and query database resources.
brew:fauna-shell.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can import or export data artifacts.
brew:fauna-shell.recommendedControl: Gate mutating queries, imports, exports, and secret reads.
brew:fauna-shell.agentUseGuidance: Allow safe schema reads; require approval for writes, deletes, and data exports.

brew:jfrog-cli.summary: jfrog-cli manages Artifactory, packages, builds, and release artifacts.
brew:jfrog-cli.credentialAccess: Reads JFrog tokens, server config, and repository credentials.
brew:jfrog-cli.remoteMutation: Can upload, delete, promote, and configure artifacts or repositories.
brew:jfrog-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish build artifacts and release bundles.
brew:jfrog-cli.recommendedControl: Gate upload, delete, promote, config, and token commands.
brew:jfrog-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow searches; require approval for artifact writes, deletes, and promotion.

brew:k6.summary: k6 runs load tests that can hit local or remote systems with scripted traffic.
brew:k6.credentialAccess: Reads environment variables, test scripts, and optional cloud tokens.
brew:k6.remoteMutation: Can generate traffic against production endpoints or upload cloud results.
brew:k6.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish test results or stress external systems.
brew:k6.recommendedControl: Gate cloud uploads, production targets, and secret-backed test runs.
brew:k6.agentUseGuidance: Allow local dry tests; require approval for remote load, cloud output, and tokens.

brew:mongodb-atlas-cli.summary: mongodb-atlas-cli controls MongoDB Atlas projects, clusters, and database services.
brew:mongodb-atlas-cli.credentialAccess: Reads Atlas API keys, project config, and environment credentials.
brew:mongodb-atlas-cli.remoteMutation: Can create, delete, and reconfigure clusters, users, and network access.
brew:mongodb-atlas-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can export or change data-service configuration.
brew:mongodb-atlas-cli.recommendedControl: Gate cluster, user, network, and credential commands.
brew:mongodb-atlas-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow project reads; require approval for writes, deletes, exports, and access-list changes.

brew:akamai.summary: akamai CLI controls Akamai edge configuration and account resources.
brew:akamai.credentialAccess: Reads Akamai credentials, edgerc files, account switches, and environment values.
brew:akamai.remoteMutation: Can change edge properties, purge caches, and mutate account configuration.
brew:akamai.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish edge delivery or security configuration.
brew:akamai.recommendedControl: Gate property, purge, credential, and activation commands.
brew:akamai.agentUseGuidance: Allow read-only account inspection; require approval for activations, purges, and credential use.

brew:certbot.summary: certbot manages TLS certificates and can change web-server certificate state.
brew:certbot.credentialAccess: Reads account keys, private keys, webroot paths, and DNS provider credentials.
brew:certbot.remoteMutation: Can request certificates and modify local server config or DNS plugins.
brew:certbot.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create certificates used by public services.
brew:certbot.recommendedControl: Gate renew, certonly, private-key reads, and DNS credential use.
brew:certbot.agentUseGuidance: Allow certificate status checks; require approval before issuing, renewing, or editing live certs.

brew:pkgconf.summary: pkgconf resolves build flags that influence native builds and linked artifacts.
brew:pkgconf.credentialAccess: Reads local package config and environment paths, not secrets by default.
brew:pkgconf.remoteMutation: Does not mutate remote systems directly.
brew:pkgconf.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can influence compiled artifact behavior through build metadata.
brew:pkgconf.recommendedControl: Gate use only when paired with release builds or untrusted search paths.
brew:pkgconf.agentUseGuidance: Allow normal build introspection; require approval for release builds using untrusted pkg-config paths.

brew:qwen-code.summary: qwen-code is an AI coding tool with local file and command access potential.
brew:qwen-code.credentialAccess: May access model credentials, repository files, environment variables, and local tool config.
brew:qwen-code.remoteMutation: Can drive commands that mutate Git, packages, or cloud state.
brew:qwen-code.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can generate code and invoke release workflows.
brew:qwen-code.recommendedControl: Run in containment and gate sensitive host tool calls.
brew:qwen-code.agentUseGuidance: Limit workspace scope; require approval for secrets, publishing, and remote writes.

brew:argo.summary: argo controls Argo workflows and cluster-executed jobs.
brew:argo.credentialAccess: Reads kubeconfig, Argo tokens, workflow parameters, and secret references.
brew:argo.remoteMutation: Can submit, stop, delete, and retry workflows in clusters.
brew:argo.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can trigger jobs that build, deploy, or process artifacts.
brew:argo.recommendedControl: Gate submit, delete, retry, and token-backed workflow commands.
brew:argo.agentUseGuidance: Allow workflow status reads; require approval for submissions and destructive operations.

brew:bitwarden-cli.summary: bitwarden-cli accesses vault items and secrets from local workflows.
brew:bitwarden-cli.credentialAccess: Can read passwords, notes, tokens, and vault metadata after unlock.
brew:bitwarden-cli.remoteMutation: Can create, edit, delete, and sync vault items.
brew:bitwarden-cli.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can export secrets into files or downstream release commands.
brew:bitwarden-cli.recommendedControl: Gate item reads, exports, unlock, and mutations.
brew:bitwarden-cli.agentUseGuidance: Allow metadata-only operations; require approval for secret retrieval, export, and item changes.

brew:s3cmd.summary: s3cmd transfers and mutates S3-compatible object storage.
brew:s3cmd.credentialAccess: Reads S3 access keys, config files, and files selected for transfer.
brew:s3cmd.remoteMutation: Can upload, delete, sync, and change object ACLs.
brew:s3cmd.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish or remove artifacts and static-site assets.
brew:s3cmd.recommendedControl: Gate sync, delete, put, ACL, and credential commands.
brew:s3cmd.agentUseGuidance: Allow bucket listing; require approval for uploads, deletes, ACL changes, and sensitive paths.

brew:kubeconform.summary: kubeconform validates Kubernetes manifests and may read deployment configuration.
brew:kubeconform.credentialAccess: Reads manifest files that may include secret references or generated values.
brew:kubeconform.remoteMutation: Validation is local and does not mutate clusters.
brew:kubeconform.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can validate deployable artifacts before cluster application.
brew:kubeconform.recommendedControl: Gate only when scanning secret-bearing files or feeding apply pipelines.
brew:kubeconform.agentUseGuidance: Allow local validation; require approval before passing output into deployment commands.

brew:mint.summary: mint installs and runs Swift command-line packages for developer workflows.
brew:mint.credentialAccess: Reads Git credentials, package config, and environment variables.
brew:mint.remoteMutation: Can fetch packages and run installed tools that call remote systems.
brew:mint.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can run release or code-generation tools that produce artifacts.
brew:mint.recommendedControl: Gate tool installs and secret-backed tool execution.
brew:mint.agentUseGuidance: Allow version/list commands; require approval before installing or running tools that publish or deploy.

brew:skaffold.summary: skaffold builds and deploys Kubernetes applications from local source.
brew:skaffold.credentialAccess: Reads kubeconfig, registry credentials, project config, and environment variables.
brew:skaffold.remoteMutation: Can build, push, and deploy workloads to clusters.
brew:skaffold.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes images and deploys application artifacts.
brew:skaffold.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, run, delete, and registry push operations.
brew:skaffold.agentUseGuidance: Allow render and diagnose; require approval for build-push-deploy flows.

brew:supabase.summary: supabase CLI manages hosted projects, databases, functions, and local dev state.
brew:supabase.credentialAccess: Reads Supabase tokens, database passwords, env files, and project config.
brew:supabase.remoteMutation: Can deploy functions, run migrations, and change project state.
brew:supabase.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes functions, migrations, and generated API artifacts.
brew:supabase.recommendedControl: Gate deploy, db push, secrets, link, and token commands.
brew:supabase.agentUseGuidance: Allow local status and generation; require approval for remote database or function changes.

brew:gallery-dl.summary: gallery-dl downloads media and may use cookies or credentials for private sources.
brew:gallery-dl.credentialAccess: Reads cookies, config files, netrc credentials, and output paths.
brew:gallery-dl.remoteMutation: Primarily downloads, but can access authenticated services.
brew:gallery-dl.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can create local archives of private or copyrighted media.
brew:gallery-dl.recommendedControl: Gate cookie reads, authenticated downloads, and broad output paths.
brew:gallery-dl.agentUseGuidance: Allow public metadata checks; require approval for private downloads and credential use.

brew:hf.summary: hf controls Hugging Face model, dataset, and Space workflows.
brew:hf.credentialAccess: Reads Hugging Face tokens, cache files, repository credentials, and environment variables.
brew:hf.remoteMutation: Can upload, delete, and change models, datasets, and Spaces.
brew:hf.publishOrArtifactRisk: Publishes ML artifacts, datasets, and app spaces.
brew:hf.recommendedControl: Gate upload, delete, login, repo, and token commands.
brew:hf.agentUseGuidance: Allow public model inspection; require approval for uploads, deletes, private repo access, and token use.

brew:mercurial.summary: mercurial mutates source-control repositories and remote history.
brew:mercurial.credentialAccess: Reads repository config, credential helpers, auth files, and local history.
brew:mercurial.remoteMutation: Can push changesets, tags, bookmarks, and remote repository changes.
brew:mercurial.publishOrArtifactRisk: Can publish source changes and release tags.
brew:mercurial.recommendedControl: Gate pushes, credential reads, destructive history operations, and tag creation.
brew:mercurial.agentUseGuidance: Allow status/log/diff; require approval for pushes, credential use, and history rewrites.
